## Verification

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy src`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Security-sensitive negative tests added or reviewed

- [ ] No real credentials, incident data, or proprietary material included
